title: Runtime Prereqs Manifest
description: Aggregated system + language packages declared by the selected archetype/taxonomy's `runtime_baseline` block and every reachable atom's `spec_preferred_methods.*.runtime_packages`. The harness pre-flight uses this manifest to derive a content-addressed image from `base_image` + the union before iteration 1. Always emitted (empty manifest is valid). Plan §S15.x derived-image warm-up.

schema_version.description: Bumped only on breaking schema changes. Additive changes keep the value at 1.

modality.description: The modality this package was compiled for. Surfaced for operator-debugging and SBOM provenance; the harness does not route on it.

base_image.description: Base image to derive from (e.g. `ghcr.io/scripps/scripps-bio-base:0.1.0`). When absent, the harness skips derived-image build.

apt.description: Debian/Ubuntu apt packages installed during derived-image build. Cannot be installed at runtime by the non-root agent container.

r.description: R packages installed via `install.packages(...)`. Version constraints follow R syntax (e.g. `Seurat>=5.0`).

conda.description: Conda packages installed via `conda install -c bioconda -c conda-forge ...`. Skipped when conda is not in the base image.

system_check.description: Sanity-check assertions of binary presence + minimum versions (e.g. `R>=4.4`). Surfaced into env_capability.json so a missing baseline tool fails loud at session start.
